title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.415 - Court to determine the time within which levy shall be made
text:
513.415.  Court to determine the time within which levy shall be made. — The court shall determine the time within which the levy and collection of such tax shall be made, and shall make all necessary orders to secure the prompt and speedy payment of such debt.
(RSMo 1939 § 1398) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1234; 1919 § 1686; 1909 § 2255
